sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I've used 17 actions and still haven't completed the level. I need to fundamentally rethink my approach. Let me look at the current state and try to understand what the goal might be.
Looking at the image, I can see:
- The charcoal square is now at a position below the top yellow strip
- The progress bar at the top has filled up more
Let me check the current positions and think about what might trigger completion. Maybe I need to click the charcoal square when it's in the right position? Or maybe the goal is something entirely different.
Let me check the current state first.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after moving left 5 times
after = current_frame
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('G', 'W', 'P'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['color'] == 'c' and min(rows) == 0:
            continue
        print(f"  {n['color']}: [{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}")

# Check progress bar
pb = sum(1 for c in after.ascii.split('\n')[0] if c == 'c')
print(f"\nProgress bar pixels: {pb}")

# Try clicking the charcoal square now that it's aligned
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 46, 'col': 39}])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"MOUSE": "Top blue moves charcoal+yellow RIGHT 4. Bottom blue moves LEFT 4. Other clicks add pixels (yellow=2, others=1)."}, "object_taxonomy": {"P": "pink top bar", "G": "dark gray bg", "W": "white bg", "b": "blue squares (2) - movement buttons", "B": "black bars (2)", "Y": "yellow strips (2)", "c": "charcoal square (movable)"}, "hud_map": {"row_0": "progress bar"}, "win_pattern": {}, "level_log": {}, "cross_level_notes": ""}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Charcoal moved left 5 times. Checking if aligned below top yellow.", "goal_model": "Maybe clicking charcoal when aligned triggers completion", "recent_findings": ["Blue squares move objects, other clicks add pixels"], "open_questions": ["What triggers level completion?"], "current_plan": "Click charcoal when aligned below top yellow", "strategy_log": ["clicked all objects - no finish", "discovered movement mechanic", "moved to right edge", "clicked charcoal - just added pixel", "moved left to align with top yellow"], "failed_probes": ["clicked white bg", "clicked charcoal at right edge"]}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
